endpoints.name: GET /games/v1configuration/achievements/{achievementId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the metadata of the achievement configuration with the given ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACHIEVEMENTID}} with a real achievementid.

endpoints.name: PUT /games/v1configuration/achievements/{achievementId}
endpoints.description: Update the metadata of the achievement configuration with the given ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACHIEVEMENTID}} with a real achievementid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /games/v1configuration/achievements/{achievementId}
endpoints.description: Delete the achievement configuration with the given ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACHIEVEMENTID}} with a real achievementid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1configuration/applications/{applicationId}/achievements
endpoints.description: Returns a list of the achievement configurations in this application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1configuration/applications/{applicationId}/achievements
endpoints.description: Insert a new achievement configuration in this application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1configuration/applications/{applicationId}/leaderboards
endpoints.description: Returns a list of the leaderboard configurations in this application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: POST /games/v1configuration/applications/{applicationId}/leaderboards
endpoints.description: Insert a new leaderboard configuration in this application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: GET /games/v1configuration/leaderboards/{leaderboardId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the metadata of the leaderboard configuration with the given ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LEADERBOARDID}} with a real leaderboardid.

endpoints.name: PUT /games/v1configuration/leaderboards/{leaderboardId}
endpoints.description: Update the metadata of the leaderboard configuration with the given ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LEADERBOARDID}} with a real leaderboardid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /games/v1configuration/leaderboards/{leaderboardId}
endpoints.description: Delete the leaderboard configuration with the given ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LEADERBOARDID}} with a real leaderboardid.
